response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive software engineering experience and strong architectural skills in full-stack and microservices development (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang), he lacks the deep, recent C++ and STL expertise required for this role. The position demands a core focus on C++ for industrial automation, multi-threading, and specific security standards (IEC 62443), none of which are prominently featured in his recent work history.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience with strong architectural and full-stack capabilities.
Proven track record of building high-performance, low-latency microservices and event-driven architectures.
Strong alignment with the advantageous skills listed, particularly Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure.
concerns: Severe lack of recent C++ and STL experience, which is the primary technical competency required.
No demonstrated exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or IoT messaging (MQTT).
Missing experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and formal Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
